summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for AI-orchestrated identity verification system with major UI upgrades. All 12 features tested successfully including dramatic dark hero panel on login, Verification Control Room dashboard with animated counters, 5-stage AI Orchestration Engine with green neon glow, AI Agent Console with streaming terminal logs, confidence bars with gradients, and VALID/TAMPER validation cards.

issues: Extracted data fields show 'null' values - this is test data issue, not a code bug. The placeholder/template image doesn't contain readable document data.

critical_code_review_comments: All major UI upgrades implemented correctly - dramatic dark hero panel, animated counters, AI Pipeline with green glow, AI Agent Console with streaming logs
CircuitBoard icon error fixed (replaced with Cpu)
No console errors or runtime crashes detected
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded from previous testing. One verification request exists with APPROVED status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major UI upgrades tested and working. Features verified: (1) Login page with dramatic dark hero panel, neural nodes animation, terminal preview, grid background, (2) One-Click Demo Login button, (3) Dashboard with 'Verification Control Room' title, live clock, animated counters (count up from 0), (4) Dashboard charts (pie, bar, line) render correctly, (5) AI Pipeline visualization with 5 stages and green neon glow (#00c477), (6) AI Agent Console with streaming terminal logs, (7) Confidence bars with gradient colors, (8) Validation results with VALID/TAMPER cards showing YES/NO and CLEAN/DETECTED status, (9) Document scan container for laser animation, (10) Review Queue page accessible, (11) Audit Logs page with full trail, (12) Upload Document page works, (13) Logout clears session. No console errors detected.

login_page_hero.details: Dramatic dark hero panel (#111827), neural nodes animation (5 nodes), grid background animation, terminal preview with cursor, SYSTEM ONLINE indicator, test credentials display

one_click_demo_login.details: ONE-CLICK DEMO LOGIN button works correctly, logs in with admin@idverify.com / Admin@123

dashboard_control_room.details: Verification Control Room title, LIVE SYSTEM indicator with clock, dark hero section, neural nodes animation

animated_counters.details: 4 stat cards with AnimatedCounter component - Total Scans, Pending Review, Tamper Alerts, Approval Rate. Count up animation working.

dashboard_charts.details: 3 charts render correctly - Status Distribution (Pie), Document Types (Bar), Verification Timeline (Line)

ai_pipeline_visualization.details: 5-stage AI Orchestration Engine with dark background (#111827), green neon glow (#00c477), MULTI-AGENT PIPELINE label, stages: Upload, OCR Extraction, AI Validation, Human Review, Decision

ai_agent_console.details: Streaming terminal logs with STREAMING indicator, terminal window dots (red, yellow, green), agent names (INGESTION, OCR, VALIDATION, HITL, DECISION), log levels with colors

confidence_bars.details: 8 confidence bars found with gradient colors (red to yellow to green)

validation_results.details: VALID/TAMPER cards showing YES/NO and CLEAN/DETECTED status, validation checks with PASS/FAIL badges, AI Reasoning section

document_scan_animation.details: Scan container found for laser animation, zoom controls (in, out, reset) working

review_queue.details: Page accessible, shows 'No Pending Reviews' message when queue is empty

audit_logs.details: Full audit trail table with 2 entries - HUMAN REVIEW APPROVE and DOCUMENT UPLOADED actions

upload_document.details: Document type buttons (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport), file upload dropzone, verification process steps displayed

logout.details: Sign Out button clears session and redirects to login page

console_errors.details: No console errors or runtime crashes detected during testing
